objective: Enforce repo-specific issue lane branch and worktree naming before worktree creation, starting with HealthcarePlatform sandbox/issue-<n>-pr-pending-<scope> lanes.
scope_boundary: Add a governance-owned lane policy registry.
Add a dry-run/validation helper for repo-specific lane bootstrap.
Wire branch-switch guard to consult the helper where repo context is available.
Document invalid clean-lane cleanup and dirty-lane refusal.
research_summary: Existing branch-switch guard blocks unclaimed issue worktrees but only knows generic issue-* lanes. Issue #445 adds a policy layer so HealthcarePlatform's stricter sandbox/issue-<n>-pr-pending-<scope> branch and matching worktree shape can be generated and rejected early without product repo edits.

sprints.name: Repo lane policy bootstrap
sprints.goal: Make repo-specific issue lane naming deterministic and enforceable before worktree creation.
tasks: Add lane policy metadata for standard repos and HealthcarePlatform.
Add a lane bootstrap helper that plans compliant branch/worktree names and validates branch/worktree/issue/scope consistency.
Wire branch-switch guard to reject invalid repo-specific issue lanes before bootstrap/scope bypasses.
Document clean invalid lane cleanup and dirty invalid lane refusal.
Add focused tests for valid and invalid HealthcarePlatform lanes, standard lanes, scope/issue mismatches, and cleanup advice.
acceptance_criteria: Governance-owned lane policy registry expresses HealthcarePlatform's required sandbox/issue-<n>-pr-pending-<scope> branch naming and matching worktree basename.
Lane bootstrap helper generates repo-compliant branch/worktree names from repo slug, issue number, and scope slug.
HealthcarePlatform malformed issue-lane branch names are rejected before worktree creation in the guarded path.
HealthcarePlatform mismatched branch/worktree issue numbers or scope slugs are rejected.
Standard governed repo lane policy remains supported.
Execution-scope lane claim validation remains compatible with the branch issue.
Tests cover valid HP lane, invalid HP branch, invalid HP worktree path, issue mismatch, scope mismatch, standard lane, dirty cleanup refusal, and clean cleanup guidance.

specialist_reviews.focus: Lane policy helper, guard wiring, and tests after Sonnet worker instability.
specialist_reviews.summary: Codex implemented the bounded deterministic guard slice directly after prior supervised Sonnet worker sessions timed out without edits.

alternate_model_review.summary: Codex QA reviewed the helper, hook integration, tests, and no-downstream scope.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only repo-specific lane bootstrap validation for issue #445.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: HealthcarePlatform lane policy generates and validates sandbox/pr-pending branch/worktree names.
Malformed HealthcarePlatform lanes fail before worktree creation.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If Sonnet worker tooling is unavailable or repeatedly times out, record the deviation and continue with Codex implementation plus Codex QA.
If cleanup would touch dirty worktrees, refuse and require operator review.
approved_by: operator approval: no HITL, loop remaining child issues
